description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and release, using the gradle:jdk7-alpine Docker image for the build-job and the tutum/curl:alpine image for the release-job. In the build stage add a build-job that caches .gradle/wrapper, .gradle/caches, and .gradle/native (untracked), echoes 'Job Id:' $CI_JOB_ID and 'Pipeline Id:' $CI_PIPELINE_ID, runs gradle --gradle-user-home .gradle/ --no-daemon shadowJar, and archives build/libs/game.jar as an artifact that expires in one week. In the release stage add a release-job that runs only on tags, sets PROJECT_RELEASE_ARTIFACT and RELEASE_MESSAGE environment variables in before_script, verifies that RELEASE_TOKEN is set, then executes curl --fail --request POST -H "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $RELEASE_TOKEN" --form "description=$RELEASE_MESSAGE" --form "tag_name=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/repository/tags/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME/release", and publishes build/libs/game.jar as an artifact.
